race.comment: FLOWERDALE (15) was too bad to be true as favourite at Geelong last time and has been freshened since. The second to Terilee prior reads very well and she can bounce back quickly. DOLLAR CHASER (7) doesn't win out of turn but is going well, just finding one better last time in this grade. He can run well at each-way odds. LOUIS BARTHAS (11) has won two on the bounce and will be strong late. DAMAS (2) has won back-to-back starts and is an each-way hope
